common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to get tracking number for courier delivery method.

request_params.description: Each result set is returned as a page of entries. Use the "page_size" filters to control the maximum number of entries to retrieve per page (i.e., per call). This integer value is used to specify the maximum number of entries to return in a single "page" of data. limit [1, 50]
request_params.name: page_size

request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is "". If data is more than one page, the offset can be some entry to start next call.
request_params.name: cursor

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message
request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.description: The generate first-mile tracking number, value might be blank.
children.name: first_mile_tracking_number

children.description:
The logistics status for first-mile tracking number. Status could be:

CANCELED
CANCELING
DELIVERED
NOT_AVAILABLE
ORDER_CREATED
ORDER_RECEIVED
PICKED_UP


Note: NOT_AVAILABLE status means that Binding ID / First Mile Tracking Number is not yet bound with any order.
children.name: status

children.description:
Indicate the reason when Shopee failed to place courier order to 3PL (Kuaidi 100 supporting) or courier company cancelled the order.


Note: Will be empty if status is not CANCELED.
children.name: reason

children.description: The declare date of binding ID/first-mile tracking number.
children.name: declare_date

children.description: This is to indicate whether the tracking number list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve tracking numbers.
children.name: more

children.description: If more is true, you should pass the next_cursor in the next request as cursor. The value of next_cursor will be empty string when more is false.
children.name: next_cursor

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/first_mile/get_courier_delivery_tracking_number_list?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "cursor": "\\"\\"",
    "from_date": "2024-10-01",
    "page_size": 10,
    "to_date": "2024-10-28"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

import requests
import json

url = "https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/first_mile/get_courier_delivery_tracking_number_list?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp"

payload=json.dumps({
  "cursor": "\"\"",
  "from_date": "2024-10-01",
  "page_size": 10,
  "to_date": "2024-10-28"
})
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
response = requests.RPCRequest("POST",url,headers=headers, data=payload, allow_redirects=False)

print(response.text)
